name: User Authentication Service
description: Backend service for user signup, login, and session management using JWT.

name: Product Management API
description: Backend API for creating, reading, updating, and deleting product information (name, price, stock).

name: Inventory Management API
description: Backend API for updating and querying product stock levels.

name: Sales Transaction API
description: Backend API for managing shopping cart state, processing sales, and recording transactions.

name: POS Sales Interface
description: Frontend UI for sales staff to browse products, add items to a shopping cart, and adjust quantities.

name: Checkout & Receipt UI
description: Frontend UI for finalizing a sale, displaying the total, and generating a printable receipt.

name: Admin Product & Inventory UI
description: Frontend UI for administrators to manage product catalog (add, edit, delete) and update inventory levels.
